name: Arduino_10BASE_T1S
description: Generic library for providing IP based 10BASE-T1S communication.
note: Bundled lwIP C sources are compiled through src/lib/lwip_vendor wrapper translation units and are gated with #if !defined(ARDUINO_ARCH_RP2040). This keeps one source tree compatible with both Arduino IDE and PlatformIO while RP2040 uses core lwIP headers and implementation.
